Class Game

java.lang.Object
whistapp.domain.game.Game
Direct Known Subclasses:
PlayGame, ScoreGame
public abstract class Game extends Object

    NUMBER_OF_PLAYERS
     
    protected final ArrayList<Player>
    players

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BidType
    bidFromString(String bid)
    A simple function that transforms a string representation of a bid into an enum value.
    boolean
    bidRequiresTrumpDeclaration(String chosenBid)
    A simple getter that returns true if the given bid name equates to a bid that requires a trump to be declared at bid time.
    void
    calculateAndUpdateScores()
     
    boolean
    evaluateAndAdvanceTrick()
    A method for evaluating the current trick of the current round.
    boolean
    evaluateRoundBids()
    Evaluates the submitted interactive bids of the current round to determine the final bid and the declarers.
    String
    getActivePlayerName()
    Returns the name of the active player (either bidding or playing).
    String[]
    getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer()
    Returns the cards the current player is legally allowed to play.
    static String[]
    getBidTypes()
    A simple getter for the different bid types.
    static BotDifficulty[]
    getBotDifficultyOptions()
    A simple getter for the different bot difficulty options.
    protected abstract Round
    getCurrentRound()
    Returns the current round.
    Suit
    getCurrentRoundTrumpSuit()
    Returns the trump suit of the current round.
    LinkedHashMap<String,String>
    getCurrentTrickCardsAsStrings()
    Returns the cards played in the current trick.
    String
    getCurrentTrickWinnerName()
    Returns the name of the winner of the current trick.
    String
    getDealerName()
    Returns the name of the dealer for the current round.
    String
    getExistingBids()
    Returns a string showing the existing bids made by players this round.
    String[]
    getFinalBidDeclarers()
    Returns the names of the declarers of the final winning bid.
    String
    getFinalBidName()
    Returns the name of the final winning bid.
    BidType
    getHighestBid()
    Returns the highest bid of the current round.
    String
    getLastDealtCard()
    Simple getter that returns the last dealt card as a string.
    String
    getLastTrickString()
    A method for viewing the last completed trick from the current round.
    String
    getLoneProposerName()
    Returns the string of the name of the lone proposer.
    HashMap<String,String[]>
    getOpenMiserieHands(String currentPlayer)
    Returns the open miserie hands of the current round.
    String
    getOriginalTrumpSuitName()
    Returns the original (deck-dealt) trump suit name for display.
    Player
    getPlayerByName(String name)
    A simple getter finding the player with the given name.
    String[]
    getPlayerCards(String playerName)
    Returns the cards of the specified player.
    static int
    getPlayerCount()
    A simple getter giving the number of players.
    ArrayList<String>
    getPlayerNames()
    A simple getter giving the player names.
    protected ArrayList<Player>
    getPlayers()
    A simple getter giving the player objects.
    protected ArrayList<Player>
    getPlayersByName(ArrayList<String> playerNames)
    A simple getter finding multiple players with given names.
    String[]
    getPossibleBidNames()
    Returns the possible bids that can still be played.
    HashMap<String,Integer>
    getRoundScoresPerPlayer()
    A getter finding the round scores for each of the players of the game.
    HashMap<String,Integer>
    getScoresPerPlayer()
    A simple getter finding the scores for each of the players of the game.
    Suit[]
    getSuits()
    A simple getter that returns all suits.
    static int
    getTrickCountPerRound()
    A simple dispatch getter giving the number of tricks per round.
    int
    getTricksLeft()
    Returns the number of tricks left in this round.
    String
    getTrumpSuitName()
    Returns a display name for the trump suit of the current round.
    boolean
    isAutonomous(int playerIndex)
    Finds if the player at the given index is autonomous (a bot).
    boolean
    isTrickOver()
    Returns true if the current trick is completely played.

    A method for checking if the number of tricks won per player is valid.

    A method for checking if the players are valid.

    A method for processing an autonomous bid.

    A method for processing an autonomous card play.

    A method for processing a given card as the card played by the current player.

    A method for processing a certain bid for the players.
    void

    A method for register the final bid into the current round.
    void

    Processes the lone proposer to play a proposal alone bid.
    void

    A method for restarting a round where the bidding phase failed.

    A method to set the scores of all players to a given amount.

    Set whether the deck was reshuffled this round.
    abstract void
    startNewRound()
    A method for starting a new round.
    void

    A method for starting the playing phase of the round.
    void

    A method for submitting a single bid interactively for the current player.

    A method for updating the scores of the players after a round of playing.

    A method to check if the players can be initialized.

  • Field Details

    • players

      protected final ArrayList<Player> players

    • NUMBER_OF_PLAYERS

      public static final int NUMBER_OF_PLAYERS
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game()

  • Method Details

    • nbOfTricksWonPerPlayerValid

      public static boolean nbOfTricksWonPerPlayerValid(int[] nbOfTricksWonPerPlayer)
      A method for checking if the number of tricks won per player is valid. This method dispatches to the Round class.
      Parameters:
      nbOfTricksWonPerPlayer - The number of tricks won per player.
      Returns:
      True, if the number of tricks won per player is valid, False, otherwise.

    • playersValid

      public static boolean playersValid(ArrayList<String> names)
      A method for checking if the players are valid. This method dispatches to the Player class.
      Parameters:
      names - The names of the players.
      Returns:
      True, if the players are valid, False, otherwise.

    • startNewRound

      public abstract void startNewRound()
      A method for starting a new round. This is an abstract method, because the implementation depends on the type of game.

    • registerFinalBid

      public void registerFinalBid(BidType bidType, ArrayList<String> declarerNames, boolean wasFirstTry)
      A method for register the final bid into the current round.
      Parameters:
      bidType - The winning bid type.
      declarerNames - The players declaring this bid.
      wasFirstTry - True, if the final bid type was found first try, False, if the deck had to be redealt at least once because everyone passed.

    • registerBids

      public void registerBids(HashMap<String,String> bids)
      A method for processing a certain bid for the players. This bid is to be given as a map playerName -> BidType. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Parameters:
      bids - The submitted bids.

    • setReshuffledState

      public void setReshuffledState(boolean reshuffled)
      Set whether the deck was reshuffled this round. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Parameters:
      reshuffled - True if reshuffled, false otherwise.

    • startPlayingRound

      public void startPlayingRound()
      A method for starting the playing phase of the round. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • getFinalBidName

      public String getFinalBidName()
      Returns the name of the final winning bid.

    • getFinalBidDeclarers

      public String[] getFinalBidDeclarers()
      Returns the names of the declarers of the final winning bid.

    • getPossibleBidNames

      public String[] getPossibleBidNames()
      Returns the possible bids that can still be played.

    • getDealerName

      public String getDealerName()
      Returns the name of the dealer for the current round.

    • updateScores

      public void updateScores(HashMap<String,Integer> tricksPerPlayer)
      A method for updating the scores of the players after a round of playing.
      Parameters:
      tricksPerPlayer - The amount of tricks a given player has won.

    • calculateAndUpdateScores

      public void calculateAndUpdateScores()

    • submitBid

      public void submitBid(String bidType, Suit newTrumpSuit)
      A method for submitting a single bid interactively for the current player. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Parameters:
      bidType - The bid to submit.
      newTrumpSuit - The optional new trump suit.

    • evaluateRoundBids

      public boolean evaluateRoundBids()
      Evaluates the submitted interactive bids of the current round to determine the final bid and the declarers. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Returns:
      True, if a final bid was chosen and the playing can start. False, if everyone passed.

    • processCardPlay

      public void processCardPlay(String card)
      A method for processing a given card as the card played by the current player. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Parameters:
      card - The card played.

    • proceedAutonomousBid

      public void proceedAutonomousBid()
      A method for processing an autonomous bid. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • restartFailedRound

      public void restartFailedRound()
      A method for restarting a round where the bidding phase failed. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • processAutonomousCardPlay

      public void processAutonomousCardPlay()
      A method for processing an autonomous card play. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • evaluateAndAdvanceTrick

      public boolean evaluateAndAdvanceTrick()
      A method for evaluating the current trick of the current round. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • getLastTrickString

      public String getLastTrickString()
      A method for viewing the last completed trick from the current round. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Returns:
      A string representation of the last trick.

    • bidRequiresTrumpDeclaration

      public boolean bidRequiresTrumpDeclaration(String chosenBid)
      A simple getter that returns true if the given bid name equates to a bid that requires a trump to be declared at bid time. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Parameters:
      chosenBid - The name of the bid
      Returns:
      true if the bid requires a trump to be declared at bid time, false otherwise.

    • bidFromString

      public BidType bidFromString(String bid)
      A simple function that transforms a string representation of a bid into an enum value. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Parameters:
      bid - The name of the bid.
      Returns:
      The enum value.

    • registerLoneProposer

      public void registerLoneProposer(String proposer)
      Processes the lone proposer to play a proposal alone bid. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Parameters:
      proposer - The proposer to register.

    • validatePlayerInitialization

      protected void validatePlayerInitialization(ArrayList<String> players) throws IllegalArgumentException, IllegalStateException
      A method to check if the players can be initialized.
      Parameters:
      players - The list of players to check.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException
      IllegalStateException

    • isAutonomous

      public boolean isAutonomous(int playerIndex)
      Finds if the player at the given index is autonomous (a bot). By default, this is not supported and returns false.
      Parameters:
      playerIndex - The index of the player to check
      Returns:
      True if autonomous, false otherwise

    • isTrickOver

      public boolean isTrickOver()
      Returns true if the current trick is completely played. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • getBotDifficultyOptions

      public static BotDifficulty[] getBotDifficultyOptions()
      A simple getter for the different bot difficulty options.

    • getBidTypes

      public static String[] getBidTypes()
      A simple getter for the different bid types.

    • getTrickCountPerRound

      public static int getTrickCountPerRound()
      A simple dispatch getter giving the number of tricks per round. This method dispatches to the Round class.
      Returns:
      The number of tricks per round.

    • getPlayerCount

      public static int getPlayerCount()
      A simple getter giving the number of players.
      Returns:
      The number of players.

    • getPlayers

      protected ArrayList<Player> getPlayers()
      A simple getter giving the player objects.

    • getPlayerNames

      public ArrayList<String> getPlayerNames()
      A simple getter giving the player names.

    • getPlayerByName

      public Player getPlayerByName(String name)
      A simple getter finding the player with the given name. Returns null if there is no such player.

    • getPlayersByName

      protected ArrayList<Player> getPlayersByName(ArrayList<String> playerNames)
      A simple getter finding multiple players with given names. Can have null values if there exists no player with that name.

    • getScoresPerPlayer

      public HashMap<String,Integer> getScoresPerPlayer()
      A simple getter finding the scores for each of the players of the game.

    • getRoundScoresPerPlayer

      public HashMap<String,Integer> getRoundScoresPerPlayer()
      A getter finding the round scores for each of the players of the game.

    • getCurrentRound

      protected abstract Round getCurrentRound()
      Returns the current round.

    • getTricksLeft

      public int getTricksLeft()
      Returns the number of tricks left in this round. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • getActivePlayerName

      public String getActivePlayerName()
      Returns the name of the active player (either bidding or playing). By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • getPlayerCards

      public String[] getPlayerCards(String playerName)
      Returns the cards of the specified player. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • getCurrentRoundTrumpSuit

      public Suit getCurrentRoundTrumpSuit()
      Returns the trump suit of the current round. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • getHighestBid

      public BidType getHighestBid()
      Returns the highest bid of the current round. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • getOpenMiserieHands

      public HashMap<String,String[]> getOpenMiserieHands(String currentPlayer)
      Returns the open miserie hands of the current round. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Parameters:
      currentPlayer - The player currently playing.

    • getCurrentTrickCardsAsStrings

      public LinkedHashMap<String,String> getCurrentTrickCardsAsStrings()
      Returns the cards played in the current trick. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer

      public String[] getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer()
      Returns the cards the current player is legally allowed to play. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • getTrumpSuitName

      public String getTrumpSuitName()
      Returns a display name for the trump suit of the current round. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • getOriginalTrumpSuitName

      public String getOriginalTrumpSuitName()
      Returns the original (deck-dealt) trump suit name for display. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • getCurrentTrickWinnerName

      public String getCurrentTrickWinnerName()
      Returns the name of the winner of the current trick. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.

    • getLastDealtCard

      public String getLastDealtCard()
      Simple getter that returns the last dealt card as a string. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Returns:
      the name of the last dealt card.

    • getSuits

      public Suit[] getSuits()
      A simple getter that returns all suits. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Returns:
      An array containing all suits

    • getExistingBids

      public String getExistingBids()
      Returns a string showing the existing bids made by players this round. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Returns:
      The string.

    • getLoneProposerName

      public String getLoneProposerName()
      Returns the string of the name of the lone proposer. By default, this is not supported and throws an exception.
      Returns:
      The name.

    • setAllScores

      protected void setAllScores(int score)
      A method to set the scores of all players to a given amount.
      Parameters:
      score - The score to set to.

      Precondition: The game has been initialized with players: getPlayers().size() == 4
